name: shader_experiment
description: Safely experiment with a shader modification: backup, modify, test, and optionally revert

steps.name: identify_shader
steps.description: Map the shader dependency graph to understand which shaders and includes are involved

steps.name: baseline_screenshot
steps.description: Capture a before screenshot for visual comparison

steps.name: compile_test
steps.description: Compile the modified shader to check for syntax errors

steps.name: hot_reload
steps.description: Hot-reload the shader into the running engine

steps.name: visual_compare
steps.description: Capture an after screenshot and compare with baseline

steps.name: perf_compare
steps.description: Capture post-change performance and compare with baseline

steps.name: decide
steps.description: Decide whether to keep or revert the change based on visual and perf results

steps.name: log_result
steps.description: Log the experiment outcome in persistent memory
